notes: Hero animation coverage manifest. States marked accepted must have exported Android resource files at the listed asset paths.

sheetSpec.phoneReadability: Silhouette, pose, and prop should read on a portrait phone Live-Lite lane before runtime integration.

validStatuses.accepted: Accepted for runtime use; exported asset must exist.
validStatuses.planned_bv044: Starter hero animation pack planned for BV-044.
validStatuses.missing_bv045: Current roster animation backlog planned for BV-045.

idle.label: idle
idle.description: Readable standing loop for roster, prep, and Live-Lite pauses.

fight.label: fight
fight.description: Short attack or effort loop for route hazards.

hurt_dead.label: hurt/dead
hurt_dead.description: Failure or downed state for bad outcomes.

loot_interact.label: loot/interact
loot_interact.description: Reward, search, or paperwork interaction beat.
